title: Shoe Size Converter - US, EU, UK Size Chart
description: Free shoe size converter. Convert between US, EU, UK, and CM shoe sizes for men, women, and children instantly.
keywords: shoe size converter, US to EU shoe size, UK shoe size chart, shoe size calculator, international shoe sizes
intro: Convert shoe sizes between US, EU, UK, and centimeter measurements. Select gender and enter your size in any system.

faq.q: How do US and EU shoe sizes compare?
faq.a: US men's sizes are roughly EU size minus 33 (e.g., US 10 ≈ EU 43). Women's US sizes are EU minus 31 (e.g., US 8 ≈ EU 39).

faq.q: How do I measure my foot size?
faq.a: Stand on paper, trace your foot, and measure from heel to longest toe in cm. Use the cm measurement for the most accurate conversion.

faq.q: Do shoe sizes vary between brands?
faq.a: Yes, sizes can vary by 0.5-1 size between brands. Always try shoes on or check brand-specific size charts when possible.
